name: Easy and Quick Potato Quiche
recipeIngredient: Mashed potato (enough to line a quiche dish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a quiche dish with mashed potato.
2. Mix the vegetables and herbs and spices together with the cheese and egg whites.
3. Spread the mixture over the potato base.
4. Bake in a moderate oven for 35 to 40 minutes, or until the filling has set.
